title: Find the Kth Largest Integer in the Array
titleCn: 找出数组中的第 K 大整数

testcases.input: nums = ["3","6","7","10"], k = 4 Output: "3" Explanation: The numbers in nums sorted in non-decreasing order are ["3","6","7","10"]. The 4th largest integer in nums is "3".
testcases.expectedOutput: "3" Explanation: The numbers in nums sorted in non-decreasing order are ["3","6","7","10"]. The 4th largest integer in nums is "3".

testcases.input: nums = ["2","21","12","1"], k = 3 Output: "2" Explanation: The numbers in nums sorted in non-decreasing order are ["1","2","12","21"]. The 3rd largest integer in nums is "2".
testcases.expectedOutput: "2" Explanation: The numbers in nums sorted in non-decreasing order are ["1","2","12","21"]. The 3rd largest integer in nums is "2".

testcases.input: nums = ["0","0"], k = 2 Output: "0" Explanation: The numbers in nums sorted in non-decreasing order are ["0","0"]. The 2nd largest integer in nums is "0".
testcases.expectedOutput: "0" Explanation: The numbers in nums sorted in non-decreasing order are ["0","0"]. The 2nd largest integer in nums is "0".
